message: ../testdata/hocon/subst-tokenize/st-err04-invalid-unicode-nonhex.conf: 1: Expecting a value but got wrong token: 'ZZZZ' (Malformed hex digits after \u escape in string: 'ZZZZ') (if you intended 'ZZZZ' (Malformed hex digits after \u escape in string: 'ZZZZ') to be part of a key or string value, try enclosing the key or value in double quotes, or you may be able to rename the file .properties rather than .conf)
